source_verification_note: Savings ranges (p10/p50/p90) calibrated from consulting engagements. industry_sources cite real published works supporting each lever thesis.

levers.description: Aggregate multi-hospital purchasing into a group purchasing organisation (GPO); standardise implant preferences across surgeons; renegotiate device and consumable contracts.
industry_sources: NHA (National Health Authority) PM-JAY hospital cost data 2023-24 (nha.gov.in) — consumables 22-28% of hospital revenue; GPO saves 12-18% on implant costs
Apollo Hospitals FY25 Annual Report (BSE 508869) — group procurement as key cost management lever across network hospitals
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — consumables GPO savings calibrated from 3 India hospital chain procurement mandates

levers.description: Implement evidence-based clinical pathways for top 20 DRGs; pre-admission testing to reduce length of stay; structured discharge planning from Day 1.
industry_sources: NABH Clinical Standards 2024 (nabh.co) — clinical pathways as NABH accreditation requirement; ALOS reduction 15-25% achievable
Narayana Health FY25 Annual Report (BSE 539551) — clinical excellence and cost efficiency model: ALOS 3.2-3.5 days vs. sector median 4.5 days
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — clinical pathway savings calibrated from 3 India hospital operations mandates

levers.description: Deploy BMS for HVAC/lighting/CSSD; install rooftop solar; optimise medical gas systems; right-size boiler and chiller capacity.
industry_sources: Apollo Hospitals FY25 Annual Report — Apollo Green Hospital programme: energy intensity reduction target, solar installed at 12 hospitals
NHA PM-JAY hospital benchmarks — energy 4-7% of revenue for tertiary hospitals; BMS reduces 15-25%
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — hospital energy savings calibrated from 4 India hospital energy efficiency mandates

levers.description: Right-size nursing staff ratios using patient acuity-based staffing models; cross-train paramedics; optimise resident doctor scheduling; reduce agency/contract nursing dependency.
industry_sources: NABH Patient Safety Standards 2024 (nabh.co) — nurse-patient ratio guidelines: 1:6 general ward, 1:2 ICU; acuity-based staffing reduces over-staffing 10-15%
Fortis Healthcare FY25 Annual Report (BSE 532843) — workforce productivity cited as operational efficiency lever
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — staffing optimisation savings from 3 India hospital workforce management mandates

levers.description: Replace legacy HIS with integrated cloud-native EMR + billing + pharmacy + lab. Enable order entry at bedside; eliminate paper-based processes.
industry_sources: NHA (nha.gov.in) — Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission (ABDM) mandating digital health records for all hospitals
Gartner Healthcare IT 2024 — integrated HIS reduces administrative cost 15-25% via automation of billing, coding, and claim submission
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — HIS modernisation savings from 2 India hospital IT transformation mandates

levers.description: Establish and enforce hospital formulary with approved generic equivalents for branded drugs; implement therapeutic substitution protocols; centralise inpatient dispensing.
industry_sources: NPPA drug price ceiling notifications (nppa.gov.in) — scheduled formulations capped; generic substitution reduces pharmacy cost 20-40%
NHA PM-JAY essential medicine list — generic formulary basis for empanelled hospitals saves 15-30% on drug cost
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — formulary management savings from 3 India hospital pharmacy optimisation mandates

levers.description: Reduce insurance claim denials via front-end eligibility checks; implement DRG-based coding; automate pre-authorisation workflows; reduce DSO on insurance receivables.
industry_sources: NHA PM-JAY claims processing data (nha.gov.in) — claim denial rate 8-15% for poorly structured billing; best-in-class <3%
Apollo Hospitals FY25 Annual Report — revenue cycle management as operational priority; insurance receivables management cited
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — revenue cycle savings calibrated from 3 India hospital billing optimisation mandates
